'''âv-t-m''' ('''vatama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zerg|zerg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zerg|zerg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-t-m
|-
! Lemma
| vatama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vatamithi|vatamithi]] || [[word:vatamiji|vatamiji]] || [[word:vatamishi|vatamishi]] || [[word:vatami|vatami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatamuthuth|vatamuthuth]] || [[word:vatamujuj|vatamujuj]] || [[word:vatamushush|vatamushush]] || [[word:vatam|vatam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatamuthu|vatamuthu]] || [[word:vatamuju|vatamuju]] || [[word:vatamushu|vatamushu]] || [[word:vatamu|vatamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatamufuth|vatamufuth]] || [[word:vatamufuj|vatamufuj]] || [[word:vatamufush|vatamufush]] || [[word:vatamuf|vatamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vatamethe|vatamethe]] || [[word:vatameje|vatameje]] || [[word:vatameshe|vatameshe]] || [[word:vatame|vatame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatamothoth|vatamothoth]] || [[word:vatamojoj|vatamojoj]] || [[word:vatamoshosh|vatamoshosh]] || [[word:vatam|vatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatamotho|vatamotho]] || [[word:vatamojo|vatamojo]] || [[word:vatamosho|vatamosho]] || [[word:vatamo|vatamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatamofoth|vatamofoth]] || [[word:vatamofoj|vatamofoj]] || [[word:vatamofosh|vatamofosh]] || [[word:vatamof|vatamof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatamĂŻfĂŻf|vatamĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻfĂŻf|vatamĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻfĂŻf|vatamĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻfĂŻf|vatamĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]] || [[word:vatamĂŻf|vatamĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vatamĂŠthĂŠ|vatamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vatamĂŠjĂŠ|vatamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vatamĂŠshĂŠ|vatamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vatamĂŠ|vatamĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatamathath|vatamathath]] || [[word:vatamajaj|vatamajaj]] || [[word:vatamashash|vatamashash]] || [[word:vatam|vatam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatamatha|vatamatha]] || [[word:vatamaja|vatamaja]] || [[word:vatamasha|vatamasha]] || [[word:vatama|vatama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatamafath|vatamafath]] || [[word:vatamafaj|vatamafaj]] || [[word:vatamafash|vatamafash]] || [[word:vatamaf|vatamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vatamasha|vatamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govatamasha|govatamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivatamasha|gokivatamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vatamnĂŒsha|vatamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govatamnknĂŒsha|govatamnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivatamnĂŒsha|gokivatamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vatamshĂ«sha|vatamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govatamnkshĂ«sha|govatamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivatamshĂ«sha|gokivatamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vatamrosha|vatamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govatamnkrosha|govatamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivatamrosha|gokivatamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vatammusha|vatammusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govatamnkmusha|govatamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatammusha|gokivatammusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vatamsherasha|vatamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govatamnksherasha|govatamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivatamsherasha|gokivatamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vatamngasha|vatamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govatamnkngasha|govatamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivatamngasha|gokivatamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vatamyasha|vatamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govatamnkyasha|govatamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivatamyasha|gokivatamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vatamyamasha|vatamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govatamnkyamasha|govatamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivatamyamasha|gokivatamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vatamnĂŒshĂ«sha|vatamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govatamnknĂŒshĂ«sha|govatamnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivatamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokivatamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vatamnĂŒrosha|vatamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govatamnknĂŒrosha|govatamnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivatamnĂŒrosha|gokivatamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatamnĂŒmusha|vatamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govatamnknĂŒmusha|govatamnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatamnĂŒmusha|gokivatamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vatamshĂ«nĂŒsha|vatamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govatamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|govatamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivatamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokivatamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vatamshĂ«rosha|vatamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govatamnkshĂ«rosha|govatamnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivatamshĂ«rosha|gokivatamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatamshĂ«musha|vatamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govatamnkshĂ«musha|govatamnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatamshĂ«musha|gokivatamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vatamronĂŒsha|vatamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govatamnkronĂŒsha|govatamnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivatamronĂŒsha|gokivatamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vatamroshĂ«sha|vatamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govatamnkroshĂ«sha|govatamnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivatamroshĂ«sha|gokivatamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatamromusha|vatamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govatamnkromusha|govatamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatamromusha|gokivatamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vatammunĂŒsha|vatammunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govatamnkmunĂŒsha|govatamnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivatammunĂŒsha|gokivatammunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vatammushĂ«sha|vatammushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govatamnkmushĂ«sha|govatamnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivatammushĂ«sha|gokivatammushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vatammurosha|vatammurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govatamnkmurosha|govatamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivatammurosha|gokivatammurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vatam|vatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠm|vĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovatam|hovatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovĂŠtĂŠm|hovĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovatam|hohovatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovĂŠtĂŠm|hohovĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒvatam|nĂŒvatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒvĂŠtĂŠm|nĂŒvĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvatam|nĂŒnĂŒvatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠtĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻvatam|nĂŻvatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻvĂŠtĂŠm|nĂŻvĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvatam|nĂŻnĂŻvatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠtĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvatam|luvatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvĂŠtĂŠm|luvĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvatam|luluvatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvĂŠtĂŠm|luluvĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livatam|livatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livĂŠtĂŠm|livĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivatam|lilivatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivĂŠtĂŠm|lilivĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovatam|kovatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovĂŠtĂŠm|kovĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovatam|kokovatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovĂŠtĂŠm|kokovĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevatam|kevatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevĂŠtĂŠm|kevĂŠtĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevatam|kekevatam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevĂŠtĂŠm|kekevĂŠtĂŠm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
